gt_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T3.element FROM bond AS T1 INNER JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.bond_id = T2.bond_id INNER JOIN atom AS T3 ON T2.atom_id = T3.atom_id WHERE T1.bond_type = '#'
pred_sql:
SELECT a1.element
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
WHERE b.bond_type = '#'
UNION ALL
SELECT a2.element
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE b.bond_type = '#';
question: List the elements of all the triple bonds.
